generated_exposure.exposure_text: I've been thinking about our alliance commitments lately. It's clear we need to stand with our partners, but we also need to make sure they're pulling their weight. My neighbor's son just got deployed - again - and it's not fair that some countries aren't doing their part. We should support our troops by making sure our allies contribute equally. #StrongAlliances #FairBurdenSharing
